violated_contract: Owner-boundary PushToTalkStateMachineTests must install the production voice-turn effect handler without starting a physical or warm capture lifecycle; using beginPushToTalkForAutomation() for handler install still calls startListening() and can hang forever on polluted RealtimeHub/singleton state in parallel CI.
canonical_prevention: Provide a DEBUG-only installOwnerBoundaryEffectHandlerForTesting() (or equivalent) that only configures the automation bar and effect handler, and use it from owner-boundary tests instead of beginPushToTalkForAutomation()+cleanup().
